name: AWS Activate Founders
headline: AWS credits to get your startup off the ground — no VC required
what_you_get: $1,000 in AWS credits (valid 2 years)
AWS technical support credits
Access to AWS Startup community and events
Free AWS training credits
eligibility: Pre-seed or bootstrapped startup (no VC funding required)
Less than 10 years old
Haven't received AWS Activate credits before
how_to_apply: Apply at aws.amazon.com/activate → select 'Founders' tier → submit startup details. Approval within 2-5 business days.
india_notes: Available for Indian entities. Credits apply to AWS services. GST invoice available for business accounts.

name: AWS Activate Portfolio
headline: Up to $25,000 in AWS credits via your VC or accelerator partner
what_you_get: $25,000 in AWS Promotional credits (valid 2 years)
1 year of AWS Business Support
80 credits for AWS Training and Certification
Access to AWS Startup architecture review
AWS Well-Architected Review at no cost
eligibility: Backed by an AWS Activate Partner (most Indian VCs like Blume, Stellaris, Peak XV, 3one4 are partners)
Startup less than 10 years old
Must apply via a partner-provided Organisation ID
how_to_apply: Ask your VC/accelerator for their AWS Activate Organisation ID. Apply at aws.amazon.com/activate with the org ID. Approval in 5-10 days.
india_notes: Almost all major Indian VCs (Blume, Stellaris, 3one4, Accel India, Elevation) are AWS Activate Partners. Email your VC's platform team for the org ID.

name: AWS Activate Accelerate
headline: $100,000 in AWS credits for Series A+ startups and accelerator cohorts
what_you_get: $100,000 in AWS Promotional credits
2 years of AWS Business Support
Access to AWS Solutions Architect for dedicated support
AWS Well-Architected Reviews
Credits for AWS training and certification
eligibility: Must be in an AWS partner accelerator (YC, Surge, Antler, TechStars, etc.)
OR have Series A+ funding from a Tier-1 VC
Building on AWS infrastructure
how_to_apply: Via your accelerator cohort program, or contact AWS Startup Business Development team directly if Series A funded.
india_notes: Surge (Peak XV) cohort companies get AWS Accelerate credits automatically. YC companies also qualify. Contact the AWS India startup team.

name: Google for Startups Cloud Program
headline: Up to $200,000 in Google Cloud credits over 2 years
what_you_get: Up to $200,000 in Google Cloud credits (distributed over 2 years: $100K Year 1 + $100K Year 2)
Access to Google technical experts and dedicated Startup Success Manager
Invites to Google for Startups events and summits
Google Workspace discounts
Firebase and Firebase Studio access
Access to Vertex AI and Gemini API credits separately
Office hours with Google PMs and engineers
eligibility: Seed to Series A funded (typical: backed by a VC or recognized accelerator)
Less than 5 years old
Primarily using or planning to use Google Cloud
Must apply and be accepted into the program
how_to_apply: Apply at cloud.google.com/startup. Describe your product, team, and why GCP is a fit. Review takes 2-4 weeks.
india_notes: Fully available for Indian entities. Credits work on all GCP services including Compute Engine, BigQuery, Cloud Run, Vertex AI. GST-compliant invoicing available.

name: Microsoft for Startups Founders Hub
headline: $150,000 in Azure + GitHub + LinkedIn + OpenAI credits — no VC required
what_you_get: Up to $150,000 in Microsoft Azure credits
GitHub Enterprise access (free for 1 year)
LinkedIn Premium Business (up to 25 seats, 1 year)
Microsoft 365 Business Premium (up to 25 seats, 1 year)
Access to OpenAI API credits through Azure OpenAI
Visual Studio subscriptions for your dev team
Technical mentorship from Microsoft startup team
Go-to-market support and co-selling opportunities
eligibility: Startup less than 10 years old
NO funding required — open to bootstrapped founders
Must not be a subsidiary of a large enterprise
Apply with a startup pitch and product description
how_to_apply: Sign up at foundershub.startups.microsoft.com. Multi-tier program — credits unlock as you hit milestones. Basic tier available immediately.
india_notes: Available to Indian startups. Azure India region (Central India, South India) fully supported. Azure OpenAI with GPT-4 and Claude models available.

name: Cloudflare for Startups
headline: Cloudflare Pro plan + Workers credits for 1 year free
what_you_get: Cloudflare Pro plan free for 1 year (CDN, DDoS protection, WAF)
$500 in Cloudflare Workers credits
Access to Zero Trust security features
Rate limiting and bot protection
Email routing and Pages hosting
eligibility: Startup backed by a VC partner of Cloudflare
OR apply directly at cloudflare.com/forstartups
Using or planning to use Cloudflare infrastructure
how_to_apply: Apply via cloudflare.com/forstartups or through your VC's platform team.
india_notes: Cloudflare India CDN nodes fully supported. Excellent for India-first startups needing low-latency CDN across Tier-1 and Tier-2 cities.

name: DigitalOcean Hatch
headline: $100,000 in DO credits over 12 months for funded startups
what_you_get: $100,000 in DigitalOcean credits over 12 months
Dedicated startup success manager
Access to DigitalOcean community and events
Preferred pricing after credits expire
Technical architecture support
eligibility: Must have raised at least $50K in funding
Less than 5 years old
Building on DigitalOcean infrastructure
Apply and be accepted into Hatch program
how_to_apply: Apply at do.co/hatch. Typically requires intro from a VC partner or direct application.
india_notes: DO has Bangalore data center. Good alternative to AWS for Indian startups wanting simpler infrastructure. Used by many early-stage Indian SaaS companies.

name: MongoDB for Startups
headline: MongoDB Atlas credits + direct technical support for startups
what_you_get: $500 in MongoDB Atlas credits
1 year of MongoDB Atlas Flex (M30 cluster equivalent)
Direct access to MongoDB Solutions Architect
MongoDB University training (free)
Co-marketing opportunities
eligibility: Early-stage startup (pre-Series B)
Using or planning to use MongoDB as primary database
Apply via mongodb.com/startups
how_to_apply: Apply at mongodb.com/startups. Simple form with startup details. Approval in 1 week.
india_notes: Atlas available in Mumbai (ap-south-1). Indian startups widely use MongoDB for flexible schema design.

name: HubSpot for Startups
headline: 90% off HubSpot year 1, 50% off year 2 — full CRM + marketing suite
what_you_get: 90% discount on HubSpot Starter/Professional year 1
50% discount on HubSpot year 2
Access to full CRM, Marketing Hub, Sales Hub, Service Hub
HubSpot Academy free certifications
Dedicated startup success manager
Invites to HubSpot INBOUND conference
eligibility: Startup backed by an approved VC or accelerator (most major Indian VCs qualify)
Less than 2 years old and/or pre-Series B
Using HubSpot CRM as primary CRM
how_to_apply: Apply via hubspot.com/startups. Submit startup details and VC/accelerator affiliation. Approval in 3-5 days.
validity: Year 1: 90% off, Year 2: 50% off, then standard pricing
india_notes: HubSpot is heavily used by Indian B2B SaaS startups. The Starter tier at 90% off is effectively free for early teams. INR billing available.

name: Zendesk for Startups
headline: 6 months of Zendesk Suite Enterprise free — worth $50,000+
what_you_get: 6 months of Zendesk Suite Enterprise free (all channels: email, chat, voice, social)
Up to 50 agent seats included
Access to Zendesk AI features
Dedicated startup account manager
Zendesk community and training access
eligibility: Startup backed by an approved investor or accelerator
Less than 5 years old
Less than $5M ARR
Apply at zendesk.com/startups
how_to_apply: Apply at zendesk.com/startups with startup details and investor affiliation. Approval in 1-2 weeks.
india_notes: Zendesk supports INR billing and has strong India enterprise customer base. Excellent for B2C and B2B customer support teams.

name: Intercom for Startups
headline: 95% off for 12 months — in-app chat, support, and customer engagement
what_you_get: 95% off Intercom Early Stage plan for 12 months
All core features: Messenger, inbox, automation, analytics
Product tours and onboarding flows
Knowledge base builder
Access to Intercom Academy
eligibility: Less than $1M in annual revenue
Less than $5M in funding
Apply at intercom.com/early-stage
how_to_apply: Apply at intercom.com/early-stage. Straightforward form. Approval within 1 week.
india_notes: Intercom is popular for SaaS onboarding flows in India. USD billing — budget ~$65/month after the startup deal ends. INR pricing not available yet.

name: Freshworks Startup Program
headline: India-built CRM suite — free plan + dedicated CSM for early startups
what_you_get: Free Freshsales CRM for up to 3 users
Free Freshdesk (customer support) for unlimited agents (basic)
Free Freshchat for in-app messaging
Dedicated Customer Success Manager
Priority onboarding support
Access to Freshworks Academy
eligibility: Any early-stage startup (bootstrapped or funded)
Less than 3 years old
Apply at freshworks.com/startups
how_to_apply: Apply at freshworks.com/startups. Approval within 3-5 days. India-first team makes the process smooth.
india_notes: Freshworks is Chennai-based — strong support for Indian startups. INR billing. Especially good fit for B2B SaaS and D2C customer support. SaaS pricing in INR is 60-70% cheaper than US alternatives.

name: Mixpanel for Startups
headline: 1 year free Mixpanel Growth — product analytics for 10M+ monthly events
what_you_get: 1 year free Mixpanel Growth plan (up to 5M monthly tracked users, 10M events)
All core product analytics: funnels, retention, flows, A/B testing
Access to Mixpanel team for onboarding support
Mixpanel Data Residency in EU/US
eligibility: Startup less than 3 years old
Less than $8M in funding
Apply at mixpanel.com/startups
how_to_apply: Apply at mixpanel.com/startups. Approval in 3-5 days.
india_notes: Mixpanel is widely used by Indian consumer startups (Swiggy, Myntra use enterprise plans). Free plan supports up to 20M events/month which covers most pre-Series A products.

name: Segment Startup Program
headline: $25,000 in Segment credits — customer data platform to unify all your analytics
what_you_get: $25,000 in Segment credits (valid 12 months)
Access to all Segment sources and destinations
Free connections to 400+ marketing and analytics tools
Technical support for data infrastructure setup
eligibility: Startup backed by an approved investor or accelerator
Less than $5M in annual revenue
Apply via segment.com/startups
how_to_apply: Apply at segment.com/startups. Requires investor reference or accelerator affiliation.
india_notes: Segment is the gold standard for unifying your data pipeline. Especially valuable if you're sending events to multiple destinations (Mixpanel + HubSpot + Amplitude).

name: Amplitude Scholarship Program
headline: Free Amplitude Growth plan for early-stage startups — behavioral analytics
what_you_get: Free Amplitude Scholarship plan (10M events/month)
All core analytics: funnels, retention, user paths, dashboards
Access to Amplitude community and templates
Free onboarding support
eligibility: Startup less than 2 years old
Less than $1M ARR
Apply at amplitude.com/startups
how_to_apply: Apply at amplitude.com/startups. Very quick — usually approved in 2-3 days.
india_notes: Good alternative to Mixpanel for behavioral analytics. Used by several Indian B2B SaaS companies. Free tier is generous for early products.

name: PostHog Open Source Analytics
headline: Open-source product analytics + feature flags + session recording — self-hostable
what_you_get: Completely free open-source version — self-host on your AWS/GCP
PostHog Cloud: 1M events/month free forever
Product analytics, session recordings, feature flags, A/B tests
No vendor lock-in — you own your data
Active open-source community
eligibility: Anyone — no application needed for open source or free cloud tier
Startups get additional $50K in credits via their investor program
how_to_apply: Sign up at posthog.com — instant access. Or self-host from github.com/PostHog/posthog.
india_notes: Excellent choice for Indian startups wanting data sovereignty. Self-host on your own AWS VPC to keep data in India. PostHog Cloud also available with EU/US hosting.

name: Notion for Startups
headline: 6 months free Notion Plus → 50% off for life — your startup's second brain
what_you_get: 6 months free Notion Plus plan for your entire team
50% off for the lifetime of your subscription after 6 months
Unlimited blocks, pages, and file uploads
Access to Notion's startup template library
AI features included
eligibility: Startup less than 5 years old
Less than $5M in total funding
Apply via notion.com/startups
how_to_apply: Apply at notion.com/startups. Submit startup details. Approval in 3-5 days.
india_notes: Notion is widely used by Indian founding teams for documentation, wikis, and OKR tracking. USD billing only — budget ~$8/user/month after deal ends.

name: Linear Early Stage
headline: Free for teams under 25 users — the best issue tracker for startups
what_you_get: Linear Free plan: unlimited issues, projects, cycles for up to 25 users
All core features: sprints, roadmap, git integrations, API
Slack + GitHub + GitLab + Figma integrations
Linear Insights analytics
eligibility: Team of fewer than 25 users — free forever
Upgrade to Plus/Pro only needed at 25+ users
how_to_apply: Sign up at linear.app — instant. No application needed.
india_notes: Linear is increasingly popular among Indian startup engineering teams as a Jira replacement. Much faster and simpler. Free tier is more than enough for early-stage teams.

name: Figma Startup Program
headline: 50% off Figma Organization for 1 year — design collaboration for your team
what_you_get: 50% off Figma Professional or Organization plan for 1 year
Unlimited projects and version history
Dev Mode for engineering handoffs
FigJam whiteboard included
Figma AI features
eligibility: Startup less than 5 years old
Apply at figma.com/startups or via VC partner
how_to_apply: Apply via figma.com/startups or ask your VC's platform team for a Figma startup code.
india_notes: Figma is the de facto design tool for Indian product teams. The Professional plan at 50% off is ~$6/user/month — well worth it for any product-led startup.

name: GitHub for Startups
headline: Free GitHub Team for 1 year via VC partner — unlimited private repos + CI/CD
what_you_get: Free GitHub Team plan for 20 seats for 1 year
Unlimited private repositories
GitHub Actions CI/CD (2,000 minutes/month)
GitHub Packages and Container Registry
GitHub Copilot access for your team
GitHub Codespaces (development environments)
eligibility: Startup backed by a GitHub for Startups partner (most major VCs)
OR apply directly at github.com/solutions/startups
how_to_apply: Ask your VC's platform team for a GitHub for Startups code, or apply at github.com/solutions/startups.
india_notes: GitHub is universal for Indian engineering teams. The free Team plan is a solid upgrade from individual accounts. GitHub Copilot alone saves 1-2 hours of dev time per day per engineer.

name: Stripe Atlas
headline: US company incorporation + Stripe + banking setup — $500 in credits
what_you_get: $500 in Stripe fee credits (waived processing fees on first $500K volume)
Delaware C-Corp incorporation included in Atlas fee ($500 one-time)
EIN setup, registered agent (1 year), IRS forms
Mercury bank account setup
Access to Stripe Atlas legal templates library
Stripe Atlas community access
eligibility: Founding a new startup (individuals and teams)
Want to incorporate in Delaware C-Corp structure
Pay the $500 Atlas incorporation fee to get started
how_to_apply: Apply at stripe.com/atlas. $500 one-time fee. Setup takes 2-4 weeks.
validity: Credits applied immediately to your Stripe account
india_notes: Widely used by Indian founders who want a US parent entity (Delaware C-Corp) + Indian subsidiary. Essential if targeting US customers or planning to raise from US VCs. Atlas makes the US entity paperwork simple.

name: Brex Business Account
headline: US corporate card with no personal guarantee + $5,000 in cashback rewards
what_you_get: Corporate credit card with no personal guarantee (credit based on company cash)
Brex Cash (FDIC-insured USD account)
$5,000+ in partner perks (AWS, Segment, Stripe, etc.)
Automatic expense categorization and accounting integrations
Multi-currency support
Instant virtual cards for SaaS subscriptions
eligibility: US-incorporated entity (C-Corp or LLC)
At least $1,000 in company bank balance
Founders using US entity for USD operations
how_to_apply: Apply at brex.com. Approval within 2-3 business days. No credit check on founders personally.
india_notes: Requires US entity (Delaware C-Corp or LLC). Relevant for Indian founders who have set up a US parent entity via Stripe Atlas or direct incorporation. Used for USD expenses like AWS, SaaS tools, US contractor payments.

name: Razorpay for Startups
headline: India's leading payment gateway — zero setup fee + startup support program
what_you_get: Zero setup fee and zero annual maintenance charge
Free Razorpay Payment Links (share and collect payments instantly)
Free Razorpay RazorpayX current account (zero balance)
Free Payment Pages (hosted checkout without code)
Startup community access and events
Dedicated startup account manager for first 90 days
Priority support for first 6 months
eligibility: Any registered Indian entity (Private Limited, LLP, OPC)
GSTIN required for full features
Apply at razorpay.com
how_to_apply: Sign up at razorpay.com. KYC verification in 1-3 business days. Apply for Startup Program separately via partner link.
india_notes: Essential for any India-facing startup. Razorpay processes INR payments, supports UPI, net banking, cards, and EMI. The RazorpayX current account is excellent for startup banking without legacy bank bureaucracy.

name: DPIIT Startup Recognition
headline: Free DPIIT recognition — unlocks ₹500+ crore in govt schemes + tax exemptions
what_you_get: DPIIT Startup Certificate — gateway to all 47+ government schemes
Income tax exemption for 3 years (Sec 80-IAC for eligible startups)
Capital gains tax exemption on investments
Self-certification for 9 labour laws for 5 years
Fast-track patent examination at 80% reduced fee
Self-certification for 3 environmental laws
Government e-marketplace (GeM) seller registration
Access to Startup India Hub, mentors, and investors
Insolvency winding-up in 90 days (vs 4+ years normally)
eligibility: Private Limited Company, LLP, or Registered Partnership
Incorporated less than 10 years ago
Annual turnover less than ₹100 crore in any year
Working towards innovation, development, or improvement of products/services
Not formed by splitting or restructuring an existing company
how_to_apply: Apply at startupindia.gov.in → Register → Apply for DPIIT Recognition. Fill online form, upload incorporation certificate and other docs. Approval in 2-7 days.
validity: 10 years from incorporation or until ₹100 Cr turnover
india_notes: This should be your FIRST application as an Indian startup. It's free and unlocks everything else. The DPIIT certificate is required for almost all government schemes on this platform.

name: NASSCOM 10K Startups Program
headline: NASSCOM validation, co-working space, and enterprise customer connects
what_you_get: NASSCOM Startup Warehouse access (co-working space in 5 cities)
Access to NASSCOM's 2,000+ member company network for pilot opportunities
Mentorship from NASSCOM network (500+ mentors)
Visibility in NASSCOM annual reports and ecosystem
Priority access to NASSCOM events (Emerge50, Product Conclave, etc.)
NASSCOM GovTech and enterprise pilot connect programs
eligibility: Tech startup less than 5 years old
Product or platform-based (not services company)
Apply at 10000startups.nasscom.in
how_to_apply: Apply at 10000startups.nasscom.in. Online application + review. Acceptance in 2-4 weeks.
india_notes: NASSCOM is particularly valuable for B2B/enterprise startups looking to pilot with large Indian companies. The NASSCOM network opens doors that cold outreach cannot.

name: Microsoft BizSpark Plus
headline: For VC-backed startups: $120,000 Azure + full Microsoft stack free for 3 years
what_you_get: $120,000 in Azure credits over 3 years ($40,000/year)
Full Microsoft Visual Studio Enterprise subscription
Microsoft 365 E3 for up to 25 users
GitHub Enterprise (via Microsoft ownership)
Technical advisory from Microsoft
Go-to-market co-sell support with Microsoft's enterprise sales team
eligibility: Startup backed by a qualified VC or accelerator
Less than 5 years old
Must be nominated by a Microsoft Partner or VC
how_to_apply: Contact Microsoft for Startups via your VC or directly at microsoft.com/en-us/startups. BizSpark Plus requires VC nomination.
india_notes: Microsoft India has dedicated startup programs. Azure India data centers (Pune, Chennai) are included. Especially valuable for AI/ML startups using Azure OpenAI.

name: Wise Business Account
headline: International business account — convert USD to INR at mid-market rate
what_you_get: Business account in 10+ currencies (USD, EUR, GBP, SGD, AUD)
Virtual local account numbers in US, EU, UK for receiving payments
FX conversion at mid-market rate (vs 3-5% bank margin)
Free Wise debit card for business expenses
API for automated transfers
Batch payments for international contractor payroll
eligibility: Registered Indian business entity or foreign entity with Indian operations
Valid business documents required (COI, GST, director ID)
how_to_apply: Sign up at wise.com/business. KYC in 3-5 business days.
india_notes: Essential for Indian startups with USD revenue. Wise charges 0.4-0.7% FX fee vs ICICI/HDFC's 3-5%. On $50K USD revenue, Wise saves ₹1-2 lakh annually. Also useful for paying international contractors.
